ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime duration of the experiment */,
  "config" TEXT /* JSON configuration object for the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "mf_time" REAL /* Feature manipulation time */,
  "similar_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a similar dataset configuration */,
  "cvi" INTEGER /* Cluster Validity Index (CVI) used */,
  "algorithms" INTEGER /* Algorithms used in the experiment */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the experiment */,
  "wallclock_time" REAL /* Wallclock time for the experiment */,
  "cvi_score" REAL /* CVI score achieved */,
  "best_cvi_score" REAL /* Best CVI score across iterations */,
  "ari" REAL /* Adjusted Rand Index (ARI) achieved */,
  "best_ari" REAL /* Best ARI score across iterations */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_cvi FOREIGN KEY ("cvi") REFERENCES cv_indices ("cvi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithms FOREIGN KEY ("algorithms") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_similar_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_dataset_id") REFERENCES similar_datasets ("similar_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similar_datasets" (
  "similar_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similar dataset configuration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset */,
  "k" INTEGER /* Number of clusters */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of data points */,
  "d" INTEGER /* Number of dimensions */,
  "noise" REAL /* Level of noise */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the similar dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the similar dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the similar dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the similar dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similar_dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cv_indices" (
  "cvi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CVI */,
  "cvi_name" TEXT /* Name of the CVI */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CVI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the CVI was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the CVI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cvi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the algorithm was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Default parameters of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "cvi_score" REAL /* CVI score for the iteration */,
  "ari_score" REAL /* ARI score for the iteration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the iteration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the iteration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallclock_times" (
  "wallclock_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallclock time entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "wallclock_time" REAL /* Wallclock time for the iteration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the iteration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the wallclock time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the wallclock time entry (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallclock_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallclock_times_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallclock_times_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "best_scores" (
  "best_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each best score entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "best_cvi_score" REAL /* Best CVI score achieved */,
  "best_ari_score" REAL /* Best ARI score achieved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the best scores */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the best score entry (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("best_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_best_scores_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_best_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment run */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the experiment run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the log entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
